project: Ghana Emergency Preparedness, Warning & Disaster Response Platform
epic: EPIC 15: Advanced AI, Simulation, And Resource Forecasting
story: Predictive Ambulance And Fire Station Positioning
notes: Extended services/ml-service with deterministic resource-demand forecasting (resource-forecast-rules-0.1.0) over the NADAA-070 flood-risk feature grid: GET /api/v1/forecasts (+region filter), GET /api/v1/forecasts/{region}, GET /api/v1/staging-suggestions (+agencyType filter), and POST /api/v1/forecasts/compare. Per-district demand is derived from historical reports, rainfall forecast, composite risk, and vulnerable population, with explainable factors and confidence. Staging suggestions match candidate bases to demand with recommended units, operational constraints, and coverage radius. Added authority-dashboard ResourcePositioningPanel (Leaflet staging map, forecast list, scenario comparison, confidence bars) with fixture fallback, shared TypeScript contracts banner, smoke script, and docs. All endpoints are read-only decision support with agency leadership retaining deployment authority; no automatic dispatch.
